utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items appear. Therefore, items fully specified: destination, travel_dates, activities, additional_services = 4 out of 7.
